testsuite.name: com.globaltech.ticketmaster.order.infrastructure.rest.OrderControllerTest

testcase.name: Should create order with success and return 202 Accepted when request is authenticated
Should return 403 Forbidden when JWT is missing required scope

testsuite.system-out:
